description_long: This is a small, rectangular cabin with a dark brown gable roof and light-colored walls. The roof features a subtle shingle texture, while the walls are smooth and painted in an off-white or cream tone. The cabin has multiple small, square windows arranged symmetrically on its visible facades, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. There is a single door located on the front side, positioned centrally beneath the gable. The structure sits directly on a flat surface with no visible foundation or steps, and there are no porches or overhangs attached. The overall design is simple and functional, evoking a modest, traditional residential style.
description: A small, rectangular cabin with a dark brown gable roof, light walls, and symmetrically arranged small windows. The design is simple and traditional, with a single centered front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the centered door and two sets of small, square windows on either side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wall with two small, square windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with two sets of small, square windows and no visible door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two small, square windows and the gable roof extending above.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and shingle texture
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small, square windows arranged symmetrically in pairs on each visible facade
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade beneath the gable
